summary: Corrected Phase 1 implementation plan for GeoResilience Hub — the geospatial consulting brand of Emmanuel Yerbo and Gifty Gyamera-Annor. Includes competitive analysis of Sambus Geospatial and AccuGeospatial websites, identifies design gaps to exploit (no dark mode, no interactive maps, no transparent pricing). Defines 7-page site architecture, dark/light mode design system, GEE interactive flood vulnerability rater, placeholder content strategy, and detailed time estimate of 38–48 hours over 5–7 working days.
